zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Copley於1434年之前出生在英國時，他的父親Richard Copley58歲，母親Elizabeth34歲。他於1465年與Anne Hoo the younger在英國素可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1490年12月21日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Copley于1434年之前出生在英国时，他的父亲Richard Copley58岁，母亲Elizabeth34岁。他于1465年与Anne Hoo the younger在英国素可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1490年12月21日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Copley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Copley, for example in County Durham, Staffordshire, and Yorkshire, from the Old English personal name Coppa (apparently a byname for a tall man) or from copp ‘hilltop’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Copley was born before 1434, in England, his father, Richard Copley, was 58 and his mother, Elizabeth, was 34. He married Anne Hoo the younger in 1465, in Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 21 December 1490, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Copley est né avant 1434, à Angleterre, son père, Richard Copley, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Anne Hoo the younger en 1465, à Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1490, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Copley vor 1434 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Copley 58 und seine Mutter Elizabeth 34. Er hat 1465 in Sussex, England Anne Hoo the younger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1490 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Copley è nato il prima del 1434 nel England, il suo padre, Richard Copley, aveva 58 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Anne Hoo the younger nel 1465, nel Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 21 dicembre 1490, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Copleyが1434年以前にイギリスで生まれた時，父Richard Copleyは58歳，母Elizabethは34歳であった。1465年にイギリススセックスでAnne Hoo the youngerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1490年12月21日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Copley(이)가 1434년 이전 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Copley(은)는 58세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 수세스에서 Anne Hoo the younger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1490년 12월 21일 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Copley nasceu antes 1434, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Copley, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Hoo the younger em 1465, em Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1490, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Copley родился перед 1434 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Copley было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Hoo the younger в 1465 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 21 декабря 1490 г. в его родном городе.
